name: xdm_browser_takeover_overlay
description: Adds acknowledged browser takeover, protocol 2.0 native messaging, request metadata, capture rules, context commands, Firefox/Chromium-family parity, host lifecycle health and deterministic fixtures.
commitMessage: Add acknowledged browser takeover and extension parity
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Browser cancellation requires an accepted XDM queue acknowledgement
